title: Dogfood process identity display retry
goal: Show useful process identity for running workflow agents in operator-visible surfaces.

phases.name: implementation
phases.title: Implementation
phases.goal: Implement process identity display for running agents.

jobs.name: process-identity
jobs.prompt: You are already running as the ccc @mm27 implementation worker. Do not run ccc, do not spawn/delegate to another agent, and do not say you will use ccc @mm27. Edit files directly in this declared worktree lane. Load the pirfl skill from ~/.claude/skills/pirfl if no local copy is available. Task: implement the backlog item 'Process identity for running agents'. Scope it narrowly: expose PID/process group for external workers and a clear non-PID native id for native subagents in the existing operator-visible workflow status/detail/TUI surfaces. Preserve existing style. Add focused tests, preferably a test named test_running_agent_process_identity_is_visible or equivalent. Run the targeted test and fast workflow tests if practical. Return files changed and test results. Other agents or the lead may be working elsewhere; do not revert unrelated changes.
